ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2016 Continued To Dec-06-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by self represented plaintiff Artem Mishim. Appearance by defendant Yuri Tsapayev. Russian Court Interpreter Yanina Gotsulsky #301208 is present to assist defendant. Plaintiff Artem Mishin is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to DEC-06-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk JLee. proceedings not reported. (610)
